heading: Cost certification
label: 1748g Cost certification
text: Except in the case of mortgages on multifamily rental housing projects insured under , the cost certification required under shall not be required with respect to mortgages insured under the provisions of this subchapter.section 1748h–2 of this titlesection 1715r of this title
notes: Amendments1959— substituted “Except in the case of mortgages on multifamily rental housing projects insured under , the” for “The”.Pub. L. 86–372section 1748h–2 of this title1955—Act , struck out provisions requiring cost certifications.Aug. 11, 1955
amendments: Amendments1959— substituted “Except in the case of mortgages on multifamily rental housing projects insured under , the” for “The”.Pub. L. 86–372section 1748h–2 of this title1955—Act , struck out provisions requiring cost certifications.Aug. 11, 1955
